subject: Re: How to set WARP to run two GPUs
body:
Forgot to mention I am running WARP 1.0.9 on Windows 11 Education.

On Thursday, 24 August 2023 at 12:05:28 UTC+1 Yahui Yan wrote:

> Hi everyone,
>
> I have an intel UHD Graphics 750 (GPU 0) and a NVIDIA Quadro RTX5000 (GPU 
> 1) as shown in my Task manager. WARP only recognise the GPU 0 by default. I 
> am wondering how to run WARP to on GPU 1 or both GPUs.
>
> Thanks,
> Yahui
>
>
